title: BlackBerry Stock Price, News & Analysis
text: BlackBerry Limited stock continues to show strong momentum following recent earnings beats and positive analyst commentary. The company's stock rose 5.38% in premarket trading following Q4 2026 earnings announcement on April 9, 2026. The latest price target consensus from analysts is $4.75 with potential upside of 29.44% based on the $6.99 12-month average price target. BlackBerry's recent performance has been supported by QNX automotive software momentum, with the company highlighting 275 million embedded vehicles and $950 million royalty backlog. The company reported Q4 2026 EPS of $0.06, beating expectations of $0.04. Full-year revenue of $549.1 million grew 3% year-over-year, with QNX contributing record revenue of $268 million and 14% growth. Secure Communications returned to growth with 8% year-over-year revenue increase driven by digital sovereignty demand. The company's strategic focus on QNX expansion into robotics and physical AI represents significant upside opportunity.
